title: A Discovery in the Desert
article_text: A blind man made a discovery in the desert that was very accurate. His mate, a car dealer, had a bowl of pure water that he had brought. The man apologized for his mistake, but his friend did not criticize him. The dealer's shareholder had a philosophy about the frequency of luck. He would occasionally tap the bowl to show where it was. The burden of being blind was a heavy attribute of his life. The man's lip touched the water, and he felt no resistance. He wished he had seen the desert before he had lost his sight. If only he had known the truth, he would have felt less shame. The dealer gave his approval, and they became allies in the bath of the sun.

sentences.en: A blind man made a discovery in the desert that was very accurate.
sentences.zh: 一个盲人在沙漠里做了一个非常准确的发现。

words.eng_def: a dry, sandy place with little water

sentences.en: His mate, a car dealer, had a bowl of pure water that he had brought.
sentences.zh: 他的伙伴，一个汽车经销商，有一碗他带来的纯净水。

words.eng_def: a person who buys and sells things
a round container for food or liquid

sentences.en: The man apologized for his mistake, but his friend did not criticize him.
sentences.zh: 那个男人为他的错误道歉，但他的朋友没有批评他。

words.eng_def: to say what is wrong with something

sentences.en: The dealer's shareholder had a philosophy about the frequency of luck.
sentences.zh: 经销商的股东有一种关于运气频率的哲学。

words.eng_def: a person who owns part of a company
a set of ideas about life

sentences.en: He would occasionally tap the bowl to show where it was.
sentences.zh: 他偶尔会轻敲碗来显示它的位置。

sentences.en: The burden of being blind was a heavy attribute of his life.
sentences.zh: 失明的负担是他生活的一个沉重特质。

words.eng_def: something heavy or difficult to carry
a quality or feature of something

sentences.en: The man's lip touched the water, and he felt no resistance.
sentences.zh: 男人的嘴唇碰到了水，他感觉不到任何阻力。

words.eng_def: the soft part around the mouth

sentences.en: He wished he had seen the desert before he had lost his sight.
sentences.zh: 他希望自己在失明前看过沙漠。

words.eng_def: wanted something that is not true

sentences.en: If only he had known the truth, he would have felt less shame.
sentences.zh: 要是他早知道真相，他就会少感到羞愧。

words.eng_def: used to express a strong wish for a different past

sentences.en: The dealer gave his approval, and they became allies in the bath of the sun.
sentences.zh: 经销商表示了同意，他们在阳光的沐浴中成为了盟友。

words.eng_def: the feeling that something is good or right
the act of washing in water

vocabulary.eng_def: a dry, sandy place with little water
vocabulary.example: Camels live in the desert.

vocabulary.eng_def: a friend or companion
vocabulary.example: My mate helped me with the work.

vocabulary.example: I occasionally go to the park.

vocabulary.eng_def: a person who owns part of a company

vocabulary.eng_def: a round container for food or liquid

vocabulary.eng_def: finding something new

vocabulary.eng_def: a force that stops movement

vocabulary.eng_def: the act of washing in water
vocabulary.example: He took a bath in the river.

vocabulary.eng_def: how often something happens

vocabulary.eng_def: to say what is wrong with something

vocabulary.eng_def: to hit something gently

vocabulary.eng_def: a set of ideas about life
vocabulary.example: His philosophy was simple.

vocabulary.eng_def: the soft part around the mouth
vocabulary.example: She bit her lip.

vocabulary.eng_def: a quality or feature of something
vocabulary.example: Kindness is a good attribute.

vocabulary.eng_def: the feeling that something is good or right

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是‘准确的’？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'correct and without mistakes'?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是‘经销商’？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a person who buys and sells things'?
Which word means 'sometimes, but not often'?
Which word means 'to say sorry for a mistake'?
Which word means 'the feeling that something is good or right'?

image_prompts: A blind man walking in the desert, finding something on the ground with his hands.
A car dealer holding a bowl of clear water, standing next to his friend in the desert.
The blind man bowing his head, apologizing, while his friend smiles and does not criticize.
A businessman (shareholder) sitting under a tree, thinking about philosophy and luck.
A hand gently tapping a bowl to make a sound for a blind person to hear.
A blind man with a heavy backpack, showing the burden of his condition.
Close-up of a man's lips touching water in a bowl, with no resistance.
A blind man standing in the desert, looking sad, wishing he could see the sand.
The same man now looking relieved, as if he knows the truth and feels less shame.
Two men (the dealer and the blind man) standing together in bright sunlight, allies in the warmth.
